site.title: Ty Sohnle - Fullstack Developer
site.description: I'm a developer based in Canada, passionate about user experience and specializing in engaging animations and micro-interactions. My primary tools of choice include: JavaScript, React, Solid.js, Astro, Svelte, and Node.js.

intro.name: Ty Sohnle
intro.summary: a Webdeveloper with strong focus on the user experience, animations and micro interactions

supportLink.imageAlt: Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Ty, a Fullstack developer from Canada.
about.toolsIntro: My primary tools of choice includes:
about.passion: Beyond coding, I'm passionate about design, illustration, animation and 3D modelling and traveling. An unusual hobby of mine is collecting vintage passports, they're interesting pieces of history to me.
about.approach: While I have some preferred tools, I always choose the best one for the job, even if it's not on my usual list. My goal is to find the right solution for each project.
